_comment: Curated supporter-venue ground truth — see supporters.atlanta.json for the schema and intent. Entries are well-known soccer-watching venues; verified:false means it still needs a local confirmation pass (hours, current affiliation) before launch.

venues.name: The Football Factory at Legends
venues.note: Midtown basement bar long known as NYC's home for national-team supporters' clubs; many countries' fan groups meet here for big matches.

venues.name: Smithfield Hall
venues.note: Flatiron multi-screen sports bar that opens for soccer kickoffs; neutral ground for most nations.

venues.name: Carragher's Pub & Restaurant
venues.note: Midtown West pub with a Liverpool/English-football following; opens early for Premier League and internationals.

venues.name: Banter
venues.note: Greenwich Village Australian cafe that screens football; daytime kickoff crowd.
